title: ferray-stats: quantile only supports linear interpolation method
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.quantile supports method= parameter with 13 interpolation methods: 'linear', 'lower', 'higher', 'nearest', 'midpoint', 'inverted_cdf', 'averaged_inverted_cdf', 'closest_observation', 'interpolated_inverted_cdf', 'hazen', 'weibull', 'median_unbiased', 'normal_unbiased'. ferray-stats quantile() only uses linear interpolation (the default). Add at least the 5 classic methods: linear, lower, higher, nearest, midpoint.
